title: Kabul Industries
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Kabul_Industries.jpg|thumb|250px|Kabul Industries mining operation on [[Otunia]].]]
'''Kabul Industries''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operation based on [[Otunia]] and owned by [[Lorn Kabul]]. Its work force consisted primarily of indentured workers who were criminals sentenced to work in the mines.

When Lorn Kabul was assassinated by his brother, [[Seth Kabul]], the brother took over the mining operation, intending to enter a partnership with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

However, his plans were thwarted by Lorn's daughter [[Arista Kabul]] and her two friends, [[Tek]] and [[Grissom (Gamorrean)|Grissom]], who sabotaged the entire mining operation by blowing up the mines.

==Behind the scenes==
[[Wikipedia:Kabul|Kabul]] is also the name of the capital of the real-world [[Wikipedia:Afghanistan|Afghanistan]], which is also rich in natural metals and mines.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|3|Three Against the Galaxy}} {{1st}}
